title: Pyro-Velocity: Probabilistic RNA Velocity inference  from single-cell data
author: Qian Qin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Pyro-Velocity is a Bayesian, generative, and multivariate RNA Velocity model to estimate the uncertainty of cell future states. This approach models raw sequencing counts with the synchronized cell time across all expressed genes to provide quantifiable and improved information on cell fate choices and developmental trajectory dynamics.
steps_raw: Pyro-Velocity is a Bayesian, generative, and multivariate RNA Velocity model to estimate the uncertainty of cell future states. This approach models raw sequencing counts with the synchronized cell time across all expressed genes to provide quantifiable and improved information on cell fate choices and developmental trajectory dynamics.
